params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related properties to expand. Supported values include properties.capacity and properties.addons.

items.docs: Retrieves a list of all Power Platform environments for the tenant. The response includes environment properties such as display name, location, SKU type, provisioning state, capacity, linked Dataverse metadata, and runtime endpoints. Requires tenant admin or Power Platform admin permissions.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the environment.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of related properties to expand.

items.docs: Retrieves details for a specific Power Platform environment by its identifier, including properties, capacity, linked Dataverse metadata, and runtime endpoints.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the environment to delete.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Deletes a Power Platform environment. This action is irreversible and removes all apps, flows, and data within the environment.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the target environment.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Retrieves the list of application packages available for installation in a specific Power Platform environment. Returns packages with their current installation status, version information, and metadata.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the target environment.

params.name: applicationPackageId
params.description: The unique identifier of the application package to install.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Initiates the installation of a specific application package in the target Power Platform environment. Returns an operation ID that can be used to poll for installation status.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the target environment.

params.name: operationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the installation operation.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Retrieves the polling status for a previously triggered application package installation. Use this operation to check whether an install has completed, is still in progress, or has failed.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Lists the installable application packages available for the tenant. Returns Microsoft-provided application packages that can be deployed to environments.

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier of the environment.

params.name: workflowId
params.description: The workflow ID to retrieve flow runs for.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Retrieves flow runs by workflow ID for a specific Power Platform environment. Returns a list of flow run records including their status, start time, end time, and trigger information. The environment must have a Microsoft Dataverse database.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

params.name: $top
params.description: The maximum number of billing policies to return.

items.docs: Retrieves the list of billing policies configured for the tenant. Billing policies define the association between Azure subscriptions and Power Platform environments for pay-as-you-go billing.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Creates a new billing policy that links a Power Platform environment to an Azure subscription for pay-as-you-go billing.

params.name: billingPolicyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the billing policy.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Retrieves details for a specific billing policy by its identifier.

params.name: billingPolicyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the billing policy to update.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Updates an existing billing policy with new values.

params.name: billingPolicyId
params.description: The unique identifier of the billing policy to delete.

params.name: api-version
params.description: The API version to use for this request.

items.docs: Deletes a billing policy by its identifier.
